REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST.. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
